sections.paragraph:
pl. שַׁאֲנַנִּים adj.-

(1) tranquil, said of a habitation, Isa 33:20 living tranquilly, securely, Job 12:5 (compare שַׁלְאֲנָן 21:23 ).

(2) in a bad sense, living at ease, careless, proud, (secundis rebus, ferox, Sallust, Jug. 94), Psa 123:4 Amo 6:1 Isa 32:9, 11 Isa 32:11, 18 Isa 32:18. Compare בָּטַח No. 2, b, שָׁלִוִ, שַׁלְוָת, and Schultens, Animadvv. on Job 26:5. Subst. pride, arrogance, Isa 37:29 2Ki 19:28.
